name: Cordoba Minerals Corp.
description: Cordoba Minerals Corp. is a Canada-based mineral exploration and development company focused on the exploration, development, and acquisition of copper and gold projects. The company's flagship asset is the San Matias Copper-Gold-Silver Project, located in the department of Córdoba, Colombia, which includes the Alacran deposit. Additionally, Cordoba holds a joint venture interest in the Perseverance Copper Project in Arizona, USA. The company is committed to responsible mining practices and creating long-term value for its stakeholders.
